trustpilot.notes: Now operates as Decodo. Formerly Smartproxy, rebranded in 2025

scamalytics.status: Not applicable - this is a proxy provider, not a target for fraud checks
scamalytics.note: Proxy providers themselves are not scored on Scamalytics

key_themes: Generally seen as legitimate and secure
Well-regarded for performance, ease of use, competitive pricing
Some sneaker-focused users advise against - recommend Cookie, Zenu, Leaf
Good for general web scraping and multi-accounting

general_reputation.products: Residential proxies, datacenter pool, scraping APIs
general_reputation.note: Now Decodo - ranks 4th on G2 with 4.7/5 rating
